entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: How to fix a checkbox parameter, with two data sets with a beforefactory script. its stuck as false.
entry.content:
This is the first time I have tried making a custom report with two different data sets driven by a parameter.  I feel like I have something missing, when I run this it will only run "WithoutSubQuals" no matter if I check or uncheck the include sub qual checkbox.  Thank you for any ideas you have.

The parameter: Its a checkbox, datatype boolean, default as false, static and not required called "Includesubqual". 

The body Table name is: curriculumItemStatus

the datasets: WithoutSubQuals and WithSubQuals (for both I can run the sql and see results in preview datasets). Both sqls have the same column/field names.

I have a script set as beforefactory:

curriculumItem = reportContext.getReportRunnable().designHandle.getDesignHandle().findElement("curriculumItemStatus");
 
if (BirtComp.equalTo(params["Includesubqual"], true)) 
{ curriculumItem.setProperty( "dataSet", "WithSubQuals" ); }
else 
{ curriculumItem.setProperty( "dataSet", "WithoutSubQuals" ); }

entry.title: Re: How to fix a checkbox parameter, with two data sets with a beforefactory script. its stuck as fa
entry.content: I am using Plateau Report Designer 4.4.1.6

entry.title: Structure Formatting for Receiver in SAP CPI through Groovy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

So, there was a requirement where the XML Structure was coming with <div></div> in one of the fields and we need to remove that, it cannot be handled by XSLT as @ symbol was expected in email id so with the help of the groovy mentioned in the blog below it was resolved.

Source Structure -

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>
<Root>
<Root1>
<ADONumber>12345</ADONumber>
<State></State>
<AssignedTo>SRIVASTAVA Nidhi (External) <nidhi.srivastava.ext@XXXXX.eu> </AssignedTo>
<Priority></Priority>
<AdditionalComments>
<div>Comment 5</div>
</AdditionalComments>
</Root1>
</Root>

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/groovy-or-xslt-to-remove-xml-tag-not-values-in-sap-cpi-payload/qaq-p/13873348

1) Now, the issue is when there is a copy paste in the system sending the data instead of <div> <span> is coming.  Something like mentioned below, this is resolved by using XSLT before the groovy mentioned in the blog solution and it is working fine - but email id issue persisting.

<AdditionalComments><span style="color:rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);font-size:15px;display:inline !important;">Testing Updates after removing SPAN to DIV</span></AdditionalComments>

2) Also, when there is a mix of manual writing and copy paste in the system the field is coming like 

<AdditionalComments><div>ABC  <span style="color:rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);font-size:15px;display:inline !important;">Testing Updates after removing SPAN to DIV XYZ <span style="display:inline !important;">Testing Updates after removing SPAN to DIV</span></span></div></AdditionalComments>

For manual written words <div> tag is coming and for copy pasted words <span> tag is coming.

Not sure if I am able to explain my issue properly, require your expert advice.

Thanks,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Re: Groovy or XSLT to remove XML Tag(not values) in sap c...
entry.content:
Hi Nagesh @nageshrao  ,

I have another issue related to this blog which I posted in another thread as this thread was already closed. If you can suggest, it will be of great help. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/structure-formatting-for-receiver-in-sap-cpi-through-groovy/qaq-p/13901744#M4888500 

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Configuration of Infotype 0105 in PA70 for Fast Entry. HELP
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am attempting to add Infotype 0105 to the PA70 transaction for fast entry purposes. Here are the steps I have followed so far:

  1. Navigated to SPRO => IMG => Personnel Management => Personnel Administration => Infotype Menus.
  2. Accessed the Infotype Menus section and reviewed the User Group Dependency on Menus and Info Groups for 07 = Fast Entry of Master Data.
  3. I then selected the Infotype Menu, where I confirmed that menu number 07 is present.
  4. I created a new entry in the relevant table with the following details:
    • User Group: 99
    • Menu No.: 07
    • Infotype: 0105
    • Screen Control: (left blank)

While I can see Infotype 0105 in PA70, I encountered an error stating, "No entry in the table T558Q for Infotype 0105."

Could anyone provide detailed guidance on how to successfully configure and implement Infotype 0105 in PA70? Additionally, please advise whether ABAP expertise is required for this task.

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: Translation of a Drop Down List Box in Fiori App in BTP REST Scenario
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I'm trying to use a DDLB as a value help in a Fiori App. I only want to display the language dependend text of the value help. The problem is, that the DDLB lists the values in all available languages and not only in the logon language of the user.

Here is my implementation

Domain with fixed values, translated with the maintain translations app of the ABAP Environment

CDS View for thhe Domain

 

View is associated to my root view

Does anyone know how to solve this issue or is there any other approach?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM Roadshow LAC 2024
entry.content: I am excited to meet customers to discuss SAP ALM topics.

entry.title: How do you navigate Revision changes to a Material within MRP?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are a manufacturing company using MRP in S/4 Hana. Currently we have materials being managed using MRP that are undergoing revision changes. We cannot use the 'discontinued parts' with follow ups because there will not be a new material number. How can you navigate a change in revision to a part currently using MRP where the current stock needs to be depleted?

entry.title: SAP ALM Roadshow LAC 2024 - Spanish version
entry.content:
Roadshow de SAP ALM 2024
Edición América del Sur

¿Desea obtener más información sobre la cartera de ALM de SAP?
¿Desea conocer otras soluciones que no sean SAP Solution Manager 7.2?

 

El roadshow de SAP ALM está llegando a América del Sur. Llegará a las localidades de  São Paulo, Brasil y  Buenos Aires, Argentina.

Únase a nosotros para este evento GRATUITO centrado en SAP Cloud ALM, SAP Focused Run y la transición de SAP Solution Manager 7.2 a SAP Cloud ALM.

Manténgase atento a las fechas y regístrese:

11 de noviembre -  São Paulo (Brasil)
19 de noviembre -  Buenos Aires (Argentina)

A continuación se detallan algunos de los temas que se tratarán:

• SAP Cloud ALM para RISE with SAP y estrategias de soporte de clean core
• Implementar la empresa inteligente con SAP Cloud ALM
• Automatizar las pruebas con Tricentis
• Optimización de operaciones que combina IA y SAP Cloud ALM
• Aprovechar SAP Focused Run para capacidades de supervisión avanzadas
• Transición de SAP Solution Manager a SAP Cloud ALM

Sin duda también tendremos varias oportunidades y ocasiones para responder preguntas y recibir comentarios.
¡Asegure su lugar ahora! ¡Trabajos limitados!
Guarde las fechas y regístrese aquí

Esperamos que todos ustedes estén ahí!!!!

Para más información visite el sitio web de SAP ALM LAC Roadshow 2024

#SAPCloudALM #ALM #ALMSummit #SAPSummit #SAPEvents #SolmanTransition

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I am very interested in the digital skills initiative! After many years in HR, I had the opportunity to be part of the team to implement a global SuccessFactors (SF) Recruiting instance and begin mapping out EC. Seeing how these tools could change the HR environment for all users has inspired me to make a mid-life career change and transition to an SAP SF implementation consultant.

I have currently taken the following steps of the SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Learning Journey:

  • HRSF1 (completed)
  • THR80 (completed)
  • THR81 (completed)
  • My goal is to be EC certified initially

Thank you and regards.

Raghda

entry.title: Location/owner of private files in SAP Analytic cloud?
entry.content: How can I find the Location/owner of private files in SAP Analytic cloud? I am trying to delete some public models but there are few private files attached.

entry.title: Re: Language based Email Triggering from IAS portal
entry.content: Hi Sonia, We faced the same issue as Cosmin! Cant save the transformation. Any thoughts? Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: Foreach confusion in SAC Advanced Formula
entry.content:
@Malya 

I do not see any reason for them to get added. With foreach on FA it will keep replacing the FA one by one. Try debugging the code and see how the loop progresses. In my simple test it did not add anything

This is how the loop progressed in debug

FA     
      
4100
1
202401
PC1
#X
45.9
 
2
202401
PC2
#X
26.78
      
4250
1
202401
PC1
#X
4.59
 
2
202401
PC2
#X
26.78
 
3
202401
PC4
#X
5.74
      
5110
1
202401
PC1
#X
4.59
 
2
202401
PC2
#X
41.06
 
3
202401
PC4
#X
5.74
      
7130
1
202401
PC1
#X
2.04
 
2
202401
PC2
#X
41.06
 
3
202401
PC4
#X
2.55
      
7280
1
202401
PC1
#X
2.04
 
2
202401
PC2
#X
35.7
 
3
202401
PC4
#X
2.55
 
4
202401
PC3
#X
17
      
      

Hope this helps. 

Try clearing the data and debug with few records. The only reason to aggregate will be if after the loop you get identical records with all key matching.

Nikhil

entry.title: Harness retrieval-augmented generation in Joule and Generative AI Hub
entry.content:
Imagine if you could converse with your own business data, leveraging the human-like text responses of a Large Language Model (LLM), and have access to context-aware information to make well-informed decisions. We're excited to introduce a central capability at SAP that grounds LLM responses in business data and provides users with relevant, reliable, and responsible output tailored to their specific needs. By feeding relevant and up-to-date information to an LLM, we reduce model hallucinations - all without the need to finetune the model. 

SAP leverages retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to deliver a central and domain-agnostic service that is easy to use and scales across all business functions. This service also fact-checks LLM-generated statements by tracing information back to its sources, enabling users to act with confidence based on verified data. 

In this blog, let’s dive into two capabilities:  

  • Document grounding, a RAG feature for Joule, SAP’s AI copilot 
  • The Grounding capability in the orchestration module of Generative AI hub to build custom AI applications 

Document grounding: Enhancing the Q&A feature of Joule  

The Document grounding capability allows customers to use their own unstructured or semi-structured documents to leverage the Q&A feature of Joule. By connecting their own repositories, such as SharePoint, customers can gain fast and reliable insights from their business documents, saving time spent on finding, opening, and reading documents. 

Real-world use-case: SAP SuccessFactors is a perfect example of how Document grounding can revolutionize employee self-service capabilities via Joule. Let's say an employee needs to find information on their company's parental leave policy. Instead of sifting through lengthy documents, the employee simply asks Joule: "What is the maximum entitlement for parental leave?" Joule, powered by the Document grounding service, retrieves the relevant information from their company's HR policy documents (previously indexed) and provides them with a concise, accurate answer.

View of the Q&A feature in Joule, enhanced with Document Grounding 

 

Business Impact: This capability offers an intuitive user experience, improves self-service efficiency, and reduces the total cost of ownership (TCO) with 24x7 HR support. It's not just an AI feature; it's a whole new way of empowering teams with knowledge at their fingertips. It can lead to potential efficiency improvements of 70% reduction in employee time needed to investigate HR policies & 81% reduction in time spent by HR on ticket handling, showcasing the tangible impact of this capability. 

But the benefits extend beyond just HR. Imagine a sales executive quickly accessing the latest product specifications, or a finance leader getting real-time insights into company financial policies. By making information more accessible and actionable, Document grounding has the potential to transform decision-making processes across the entire organization.  

What’s under the hood? 

SAP’s Document grounding service leverages RAG to add vital context to LLM responses through a multi-step indexing & retrieval process: 

  1. Indexing Pipeline: This component ingests data from diverse sources, processes it, and splits it into manageable chunks. It then generates embeddings of this data and stores them in the SAP HANA Vector Database. 
  2. Vector Database: The SAP HANA Vector Engine queries these vector embeddings. 
  3. Retrieval: For every user query, vector embeddings are generated using the LLM model and a search in the HANA Vector Database finds relevant text chunks. 

Find more technical and commercial information about Document Grounding in our dedicated Help Portal page. 

A Grounding capability via generative AI hub for your customized AI applications 

While Document grounding is meant to cover Joule scenarios, SAP is also addressing the needs of developer persona who would want to benefit from the RAG capability within their customized AI applications. 

By the end of 2024, the document grounding capability will be fully integrated in the orchestration module of the generative AI hub, alongside capabilities like prompt templating, data masking, and content filter. The mechanism exposed sooner in this article will be applicable via the consumption of the Orchestration service or direct API consumption (indexing and retrieval APIs).  

 Architecture of the Grounding capability inside Generative AI hub

What’s coming next? 

Among many other features, our roadmap through 2025 includesmulti-language support, contextualization, extended list of supported document types and formats as well as documents repositories.  

Also, to enhance the quality of indexing and retrieval, SAP is working on backstage technical layers like Automatic RAG (choosing the best chunking strategy automatically), advanced retrieval techniques, Knowledge Graph integration which comes preloaded with a comprehensive representation of SAP’s business entities (including ABAP tables, CDS views, APIs, and key data models), and will play a critical role in grounding AI models and enabling them to deliver more reliable, context-aware insights.  

Any questions? Feel free to contact Grounding product management.  

Email: sebastien.beghelli@sap.com 

Interested in learning more? Refer to the links below 

  • TechEd 2024 session about Document Grounding and the Grounding capability inside GenAI Hub
  • [SAP BTP Onboarding Series]Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding for Your SAP SFSF. 
  • Document grounding Discovery center page

entry.title: Re: Language based Email Triggering from IAS portal
entry.content:
@Cosmin 

I've just tried a similar code like yours and I was not being able to save either, but I found where the issue is.

In your code, you have [$.defaultLocale], but the correct is ["$.defaultLocale"].

When I made this change, it allowed me to save.

Example:

{
"type": "valueMapping",
"sourcePaths": ["$.defaultLocale"],
"targetPath": "$.locale",
"defaultValue": "EN",
"valueMappings": [
{ "key": ["en_US"], "mappedValue": "EN" },
{ "key": ["vi_VN"], "mappedValue": "VN" },
{ "key": ["ko_KR"], "mappedValue": "KR" },
{ "key": ["ja_JP"], "mappedValue": "JP" },
{ "key": ["zh_CN"], "mappedValue": "CN" },
{ "key": ["fr_FR"], "mappedValue": "FR" },
{ "key": ["pt_PT"], "mappedValue": "PT" },
{ "key": ["nl_NL"], "mappedValue": "NL" }
]
}

Still having some challenges on sending the notification in the correct language, but I hope it helps you somehow.

Regards,

Lucas

entry.title: Settlement Managment, how can a Delta Accrual post multiple Bill Docs?
entry.content:
Currently when posting a Delta Accrual it posts a total amount adjustment.  We'd like it to post an amount for each Billing Document that has been adjusted.  How can this be set up to handle this added detail in the journal entry?

Settlement Management

entry.title: Re: How to stop the posting duplicate invoice from IDOC?

Are you an SAP enthusiast?

This is the time to join us on our first SAP meetup in Thessaloniki.

If you wish to attend please drop us an email at sapthessaloniki@gmail.com.

entry.title: Re: Building an Analytical List Page with CAP OData V4
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake 

I found your article and replicated your steps, but the total did not work too. I could make the totals work for the analytical table, so you can update your post

On the app annotations.cds, this is how I configured it.

 

using CatalogService as service from '../../srv/cat-service';

annotate service.OutboundKPI with @Aggregation.ApplySupported: {
  Transformations       : [
    'aggregate',
    'topcount',
    'bottomcount',
    'identity',
    'concat',
    'groupby',
    'filter',
    'search'
  ],
  GroupableProperties   : [
    ACTION
  ],
  AggregatableProperties: [{Property: COUNTMSGPERACTION}, ],
};

annotate service.OutboundKPI with @(Analytics.AggregatedProperty #countMsgPerAction: {
  Name                : 'countMsgPerAction',
  AggregationMethod   : 'sum',
  AggregatableProperty: COUNTMSGPERACTION,
  @Common.Label       : '{i18n>COUNTMSGPERACTION}'
}, );

annotate service.OutboundKPI with @(UI: {
  SelectionFields: [
    ACTION,
    UZEIT
  ],
  LineItem       : [
    {
      $Type: 'UI.DataField',
      Value: ACTION,
    },
    {
      $Type: 'UI.DataField',
      Value: COUNTMSGPERACTION,
    },
  ],
});

annotate service.OutboundKPI with @UI.Chart: {
  Title              : '{i18n>Messages}',
  ChartType          : #Column,
  DynamicMeasures    : ['@Analytics.AggregatedProperty#countMsgPerAction', ],
  Dimensions         : [
    ACTION
  ],
  MeasureAttributes  : [{
    DynamicMeasure: '@Analytics.AggregatedProperty#countMsgPerAction',
    Role          : #Axis1
  }],
  DimensionAttributes: [
    {
      Dimension: ACTION,
      Role     : #Category
    }
  ],
};

annotate service.OutboundKPI with @UI.PresentationVariant: {
  GroupBy       : [
    ACTION
  ],
  Total         : [
    ACTION,
    COUNTMSGPERACTION
  ],
  Visualizations: [
    '@UI.Chart',
    '@UI.LineItem',
  ]
};

 

 On the app manifest.json, I needed to change the primary and secondary path to take the code from the presentation variant settings

I added the annotation on the db\schema.cds.

 

@cds.persistence.exists
@cds.persistence.calcview
entity CV_MESSAGES_KPI {
    key ACTION      : String(30) @title: '{i18n>Action}';
        @Aggregation.default: #SUM
        COUNTACTION : Integer64  @title: '{i18n>CountAction}';
}

 

And the last step I added this annotation on srv\service.cds

    @readonly
    @Aggregation.CustomAggregate #COUNTMSGPERACTION: 'Edm.Integer'
    entity OutboundKPI                           as projection on CV_OUTBOUND_KPI;

 Take a look at it and let me know if there is any questions

Thank you for your post, it is really clear!

entry.title: Re: Enable Now users becoming inactive
entry.content: Yes it is set up for 3 months and perhaps that's why the system kept making the old existing users as inactive everyday even though I activated them. About 25 of new users from the import also keep getting inactivated and I will look at them closely to check what's going on with them. But overall, you have pointed me to the right direction.

entry.title: Re: Creating Evaluations in the LMS
entry.content:
Boa tarde, Paulo!!

Você sabe me informar como excluir a obrigatoriedade das questões de uma Avaliação de Reação?

Ao clicar em adicionar questão o sistema automaticamente já abre o campo com a obrigatoriedade, e isto esta impedindo o colaborador de enviar a avaliação.

entry.title: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content:
Using "SAP Crystal Reports runtime engine for .NET Framework (64-bit)" version 13.0.31.4010,

and the corresponding component for VS: "SAP Crystal Reports, version for Microsoft Visual Studio" version 13.0.31.4010.

The CR viewer is CrystalDecisions.Web, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692fbea5521e1304

My report has several string type parameters. One of these parameters (called p_stu_cnt) is passed to the report. This param is displayed in the 2nd page header of the report.

When the report is rendered, it shows its value fine (e.g. "100"), but when I navigate (say, go to the next page), the parameter loses its value in the report (shows "0").

Not surprisingly, if I export, say to PDF, the lost value appears int he exported output.

I found an article https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/navigation-in-crystal-viewer-with-parameters/qaq-p/10016698 that suggested setting the ReuseParameterValuesOnRefresh property of the viewer to true (it was false by default). I have done this, but no luck resolving the issue.

The value of this parameter is passed from a string variable, which is prior set to the given dataset's table row count, i.e.

string mQualifyingStudentCount = dtResults.Rows.Count;

then later passed on to the report parameter like so:

string p_stu_cnt = mQualifyingStudentCount.ToString();
report.SetParameterValue("p_stu_cnt", p_stu_cnt);

 

The strange thing is that if I just hardcode of my variable and pass it on to the report param, then the value is not lost! i.e:

string p_stu_cnt = '123";
report.SetParameterValue("p_stu_cnt", p_stu_cnt);

 

Is this a bug??!!

I appreciate your help,

entry.title: Re: Fiori App - Entityset missing
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

I'm facing similar issue on my end and I found it may be related to an issue with a timestamp in table DDANNOLOAD. If you extended the CDS view I_ARLINEITEMS to create new fields in the app Manage Customer Line Items, you need to move this extension in an independent TR, wait for the timestamp in table DDANNOLOAD get updated, than move another TR with your OData service extension.

entry.title: Re: Good to Know: SAP Travel Management for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Thanks Sheldon.  This is very valuable information.

entry.title: Re: how to convert numbers to dimension member info in sa...
entry.content:
@xyz31 

The easiest way I can think of achieving this will be using the getmember() of the Datasource. If you have a table or a chart, you can just use the datasource of it to get the description of the member and then combine it with Year from Scriptvariable 1. I am assuming you have already done the required manipulation and your ScriptVariable1 is assigned "202311"

You can use something like below

ScriptVariable_1="202411"; // Assuming this is assigned by previous logic

var DS= Table_2.getDataSource();

var Year =ScriptVariable_1.substr(0,4);  
	
ScriptVariable_2=Year+ " " +DS.getMember("Date",ScriptVariable_1).description;

 

Output: I have assigned the ScriptVariable2 to dynamic Text Box which initially shows No value but on click of the button which has the above script

 

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Usage Statistics of Table and Canvas Reports to Plan Transition to Stories
entry.content: What about the Proxy Report 2007, I see it gone from our preview instance which now has the 2H 2024 Release? What is the plan for proxy reporting?

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content:
@DARREN_S_ABE unfortunately, you can't set a Story Report to trigger when a particular Custom Task concludes -- the Story Report can be scheduled to be run/created at a regular time.

While the Story Report can't be sent or delivered via email, you can include a set of Emails to send a Notification to inform them that a given Story Report has run or completed.

entry.title: The Extensibility Wizard: One Tool to Rule Them All?
entry.content:
When creating clean core extensions for SAP S/4HANA, you are confronted with a vast number of powerful tools. The tools can be divided into four quarters by the dimensions on-stack versus side-by-side and low code versus pro-code, which is shown in the following figure:

The set of available tools may be overwhelming at first sight, so how to find the right one? And – if you found the right tool, how do you find the right API or extension point to extend the application you are interested in?

Of course, there are documents that provide guidance on when to use what (see for example in the document Extend SAP S/4HANA in the cloud and on premise with ABAP based extensions , Chapter 3, “When To Use What”), but it is definitely better to get the guidance right in the system when creation the extension. SAP is investing a lot in implementing guidance in the system. The investment goes along two paths:

  • Investment in AI support (Joule)
  • Investment in wizards

Many new wizards are available in the ABAP platform, for example for creating a new RAP BO or for creating custom fields. For a full picture, I refer to other documents and presentations given during TechEd and Devtoberfest 2024.

In this blog post I want to introduce the Extensibility Wizard. This wizard guides you from the application through the creation of the respective extension. Here is an example (instead of reading the following lines, you can also watch my demo in my TechEd or Devtoberfest session What Software Developers Should Know About Key User Extensibility 😞

  1. Assume that you are in your SAP S/4HANA application. For my example I choose the application Manage Journal Entries.
  2. Open the Fiori Launchpad context menu (click your avatar). If the Extensibility Wizard is configures (see link to the documentation with the setup guide at the end of this post), you can see the menu entry Create Extension, and you can click it (Figure 2).

                  
                  Figure 2

  1. The Extensibility Wizard opens and shows the different extensions tasks, that you can create for this application. As of 2208, the following extensions tasks are included:
    1. Custom Fields
    2. Custom Logic
    3. Custom Process
    4. The figure below shows – as a labs preview – also the extensibility task Custom Application, which is not yet available in your 2208 release.

               
               Figure 3

  1. Now let us select the extensibility task Custom Process. The next steps of the wizard now guide us through the creation of a new process in SAP Build Process Integration. As the wizard was started from the Manage Journal Entries application, it knows which triggers are relevant for this application, and offers for example the event JournalEntry Created as the trigger for a new process. As a final step, the wizard creates the new process in SAP Build and let you navigate to SAP Build Lobby and directly into the process. (Please see the complete flow in my session What Software Developers Should Know About Key User Extensibility )

I hope that this example gives you an idea on how the Extensibility Wizard works.

As mentioned, in 2208, the Extensibility Wizard includes – apart from the Custom Process – two more tasks:

  • The Custom Field task opens the Custom Fields Fiori app in your SAP S/4HANA tenant, where you can create a custom field. Also here, the business context is prefilled according to the application from where you start the wizard.
  • The Custom Logic task opens the Custom Logic Fiori app in your SAP S/4HANA tenant, where you can create custom logic. Also here, the business context is prefilled.

If you are used to open the Custom Fields and the Custom Logic apps via the UI Adaption Mode (menu entry Adapt UI, as you can see in Figure 2), you can of course still do this.

In future additional extensibility items and features will be added, for example:

  • For the extensibility item Custom Process, additional trigger options will be provided.
  • A new extensibility item Custom Application will be added, which guides you through the creation of a new application with SAP Build Code.

Curious to see the wizard in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud tenant? Configure it today, see the documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/build/sap-build-core/use-extensions?version=Cloud

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP Data Quality Management, microservices for location data: BTP Free Tier
entry.content:
Hi,

We just purchased the service and plan to consume in MDG on S/4HANA (OP) while creating BP. 

Please suggest the events to integrate in WDA based FIORI tiles (Manage Customer Governance).

Thanks,

KP Simha

entry.title: Re: Location/owner of private files in SAP Analytic cloud?
entry.content:
@PM8 

Generally its not possible to see private files of others, but you can find the dependency list for a model including the private files. Goto System > OverView > Dependencies

Select the Model line item and click on Factsheet ( right hand side). This will open another tab with list of all dependent items.

 

On this dependent details page click on dependencies you will see all items and then you can find out the owner details when you navigate the tabs. Then you can ask the user to delete the private files.

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Memeber Management in Dimension Table
entry.content:
@Bala_Kumar 

You cannot. Date dimensions can be maintained both manually ( User Managed) and automatically ( System Managed) by the application. But Once set to user Managed you cannot revert back to System Managed.

https://searchtest.hana.ondemand.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/507e3bd19dad494a8af0803a833aacf2.html?locale=en-US

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio integration using Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Ramu,

Please have a look at this iflow which is part of Community Content. 
This one has calls going to SAP Signavio and you can get some initial ideas from this for your requirement.

entry.title: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content: Solved, this can be closed. Thanks

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @ChandraV Thank you for that information. Due to our set up, T5UAP won't work. But hopefully, it helps someone else?

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Cost Center Activity Rate Calculation Hybrid Approach
entry.content: This is very informative.  Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content: I was not able to see find known bugs. Can you please refer me to that posting? if this is a bug, it is extremely weird: what does it matter to the viewer how I get the value passed in to the parameter? whether I hardcode it, or whether I obtained it from the associated datatable row count, what does it matter? it is still put into a variable, which then used to pass to the parameter value! so why hardcoding the variable value or not would make a difference??

entry.title: Re: 2024-2H-LMS Release LRN-154487 Browse Library Feature for Enhanced Search - Question about RBP
entry.content: I see the situation is solved, but just to answer your question. The "Access Advanced Library Search" is a permission found in the Learning user role and it's managed in the Learning admin side (System Administration > Security > Role Management).

entry.title: Re: How to fix a checkbox parameter, with two data sets w...
entry.content: @kelli2, you can post this situation here as well: SAP SuccessFactors Learning Custom Report Exchange.

entry.title: Re: about sums when expressions include ISNULL
entry.content:
@ko-hei 

I am not sure how your table is structured but creating 2 restricted measure and 1 calculated measure gave me the below

2 restricted Measures and finally the calculated measure as below

IF(ISNULL([#Actual]) ,[#Plan] ,[#Actual] ), where #Actual and #Plan are restricted measures

Hope this helps..

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Technical Implementation of Payroll Control Center with Employee Center Payroll
entry.content:
Hello colleague!!

Do you have any idea how to modify the PYC_ADM_TRANSACTION transaction since it won't let me add the Daemon user that I have generated for my process? or restart the transaction?

 

 

Saludos!!

entry.title: No authorization to access service group, You do not have start authorization for R3TR G4BA
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am developing an ABAP Restful Application with a single database table as source. It is a training application, there should be no problem showing you the list of elements I have created using the ABAP RESTful wizard:

When I publish the service binding (OData V4 - UI) and I want to Preview, a browser page appears but I am not able to press the Go neither Create buttons because of the following error:

I deleted the strict ( 2 ); sentence in the behavior definition but that did not help. Note that service definition and service binding has different names because wizard required to use different names. Have you experienced some error like these before?

entry.title: Implementing Tablets that Run SAP EWM.
entry.content:
Hello
I want to implement tablets for my Inventory management team. We used to work with RF but it does not show as many information as we would like, so we have to carry laptops to almost every place we plan to do inventory and analysis. Can we use SAP EWM on a tablet that runs WINDOWS 10-11? We use decentralized ERP-EWM, but we only need EWM in order to visualize more information. 
Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Post processing framework (PPF) on ECC6 EHP8 issues
entry.content: Issue was with my persistent class. I was using a structure and the create_persistent and get_persistent needs to be redefined to store the values in database. Changed that to a database table now and it works as expected.

entry.title: Accessing HANA/ECC without BAPIs and Gateway?
entry.content:
Is there a way to access information in HANA and ABAP ECC databases using CDS RESTful services without BAPIs and Gateway? I'm aware of the npm package 'node-rfc', but it's no longer maintained.
Despite researching CDS, Cloud Connector, node-rfc, and BAPIs, I'm still unsure of the best method to access my ECC database information.

I have limited knowledge of the SAP ecosystem. Could someone guide me on current best practices or alternatives for this scenario? Any links, documentation, or tutorials are welcome. Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: #CoE#HHT How to add printer to SAP Cloud Print Manage...
entry.content:
Hi Dave,

Thanks for your very detailed reply. And the issue I faced may a little bit troublesome. 

For issue 1: The physical printer has been added to this machine. After the computer and printer connected with different network, the printer still cannot be recognized in SAP Cloud Print Manager, and no function to add it. At the same time, the printer can work correctly in other applications such as Word.

For issue 2: When I choose 'Microsoft Print to PDF', there is no dialog box pop up. I have checked the default path in printer 'Microsoft Print to PDF' and set the output port. But it didn't work for Cloud Print Manager.

Very appreciate if you have further methods to solve these issues.

Wish you a nice day and best regards,

Freya

entry.title: Fetch data of customer and send to Open text system
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have one simple task to fetch data from KNA1 of fields - Kunnr and name1 and send it to Open text system from sap.

Can you please guide how work on this task? At present I am able to fetch data and store into al11 application server.

Please guide.

entry.title: Re: cannot get document details in SAP Business One mobile
entry.content:
Hi Nidhi,

Thank you for your response. The issue is occurring with the same Sales Order (SO) number. Sometimes we can open it, but other times we cannot.

When the issue happens, we do not see any specific error in the B1if -> Monitoring -> Message log. We are currently using SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.190) FP 2202 (64-bit) - CCC, and this behavior has been observed in this version.

Please let us know if there are any further details or logs we should check.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Need Expert Advice on Reading udfValues in Jasper Report
entry.content: I tried with the this syntax it worked. udfValue("ServiceContract",14,String.valueOf($F{sc.id}),"PPMInterval1"). Thank you very much for your help 🙂

entry.title: To attach SAPUI5's MVC method to Fiori Element page in CAP model for more flexible screens
entry.content:
Dear,

I hope this message finds you well.

I have developed a screen using the Fiori app generator within an IDE. The service was defined using Fiori Elements, and I can view the CDS-based table via localhost using CDS watch. The entity types are defined in the db\data\schema.cds file.

I would like to customize this screen more freely. Rather than modifying the table with the "Show Page Map," I aim to enhance the Fiori screen with additional design elements and functions to create a more versatile application. While I am familiar with the UI5 MVC development approach (using view.xml and controller.js), I am unsure if I can mix Fiori Elements with the UI5 MVC method. Specifically, I am wondering if modifying the manifest.json would allow me to achieve this.

I want to add a dialog and further functions into the localhost page created with cds.

If you have any experience or relevant knowledge regarding this integration, I would greatly appreciate your guidance. Additionally, if you could provide examples or any documentation to assist me, that would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance for your time and assistance.

Best regards,
Wonpyo

 

#sapui5 #CAP #CDS #fiori element

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding API for Retiring Assets to External C...
entry.content: Hi, Please refer to following Help Portal Documentation link, APIs in Finance: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/5792333ddf3c47eaad4314b071dfd684.html Fixed Asset - Post Asset Retirement: API_FIXEDASSETRETIREMENT_G4BA Kind regards, Lucy

entry.title: #CoE#HHT How to mass print to PDF directly in Fiori app ' Account Document Output'
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In Fiori app ' Account Document Output', can we print to PDF directly without using other support tools?

If we can do so, it will increase our work efficiency greatly.

Thanks and best regards,

Freya

entry.title: Re: Handling reverse charge mechanism for SST
entry.content: Hi, I checked following similar request as your query, hope it helps, Malaysia GST Reverse charge at Payment https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/reverse-charge-in-taxation/ba-p/13344984 You may accomplish the reverse charge in the settings of input tax/output tax. Kind Regards, Lucy

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start V2.0 - Release Update
entry.content: This is excellent for customers to deploy spaces and pages and UI integration cards for mobile users.

entry.title: Re: Cloud API Enablement - FAQ
entry.content:
Hi @AlexanderRother thanks for your sharings,


We have a scenario where we need to update supplier withholding taxes, but the Business Partner BO interface does not offer the functionality yet (on premise), so we've considered creating a wrapper for the classic BAPI. But on the other hand we've noticed that API_BUSINESS_PARTNER can perform the tax update as well, so consuming it internally would work too. Is the approach of consuming internally a standard API valid for Tier 1 scenarios or we should always prioritize RAP BO interfaces / BAPI wrappers?

Thanks

Thank you for your question.

Configuring the Output of FI Customer Invoices

Anne

Receiving this voucher would be an invaluable opportunity for me to pursue the certification, enhance my expertise in SAP FI, and ultimately provide better solutions to my clients and contribute more effectively to my team’s success.

Regards,
Xuan Hau

entry.content: Very well explained.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plans - several skipped in one day and one PM got generated
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Error - Logon to the SAP Cloud System - Trial Version
entry.content:
Error - Logon to the SAP Cloud System - Trial Version

I imported the Service Key from SAP BTP trial version to Eclipse and try to connect by creating New ABAP Cloud Project. I copied the URL and opened in Incognito mode. 

_________________________________________________________

You have been successfully logged on

You can close this page and continue in the ABAP Development Tools.
_________________________________________________________
Error in Eclipse

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plans - several skipped in one day and one PM got generated
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check if you have task lists assigned to these plans. The validity start date of these task lists should be before the start date of the work order/s, which will be generated automatically by the deadline monitoring. If the system doesn't find any valid task list operations for the order to be generated for given date, then there will be issues.

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: To attach SAPUI5's MVC method to Fiori Element page i...
entry.content:
use v4 with FPM, where your basic ui5 mvc knowledge may help you a bit.

if you go with v2, you current knowledge is far from enough.

entry.title: Re: Post Goods Receipt Without Reference in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Thanks for the blog, Is there any chance to modify the movement type in this app?

entry.title: Re: Hello Bengaluru community, Come, Say Hi! and share your journey with us!!
entry.content:
I am Kannan Ramaswamy, born in Trichy, Tamil Nadu. My career started back in 2010 after I joined Wipro Technologies, and I started working on SAP BW for clients like Nike.  That is when I was impressed with the kind of solutions that SAP provides and the magnitude of its client organizations. Later I worked with Infosys for few years before starting to work at SAP Labs. 

I've been in Labs since 2018. I enjoy learning and teaching new technologies. I like travel and meeting new people and getting new experiences. 

Looking up to getting to know many of you from the community.

entry.title: Re: What topics do you have expertise in and what do you plan to learn or upgrade to?
entry.content:
I am into data and analytics. I have learnt, worked with and delivered solutions on SAP BW, SAP HANA and SAP Analytics Cloud. 

I am currently working with and learning SAP Datasphere. I have a introductory knowledge in SAP BTP and would love to learn more.

Best regards

Williams

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David, 

I am a student from Vietnam, eager to take advantage of the free certification attempts for SAP. 

I have greatly benefited from the Coursera SAP Consultant training in partnership with SAP. Through the Next-Gen program and the learning hub's student zone, I have embarked on various learning journeys. These valuable opportunities have impacted my life and the lives of many others. My aspiration is to excel as a consultant and be a role model in this field. The journey is challenging, but I am dedicated to reaching my goals.

entry.title: Re: Change output to a different Datastore in existing task?
entry.content:
As long as the target type changed, you will need to create a new task. 
Replicate a task will not change the target datastore.

entry.title: My Exclusive View of SAP TechEd 2024 in Action!
Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content: Hello, I’m ahmed I’m from egypt. I’m interesting in participating in the digital skills initiative.

entry.title: Re: Change output to a different Datastore in existing task?
entry.content: no easy way to do so. if target datastore is changed, then have to create a new task from scratch with the different target datastore. you can create target File Format based IBP table structure, which can save you a little effort.

entry.title: 在使用Clear G/L Accounting Documents Clear Vendor Invoice with Outgoing Payment 的时候，貌似不支持现有的业务需求
entry.content: 做账的时候，借：预付账款，贷：银行存款  ，但是清账的时候，无法实现，借：xx费用   贷：预付账款

entry.title: Re: 2024-2H-LMS Release LRN-154487 Browse Library Feature...
entry.content: Hi Michael, I have same question about the permission "Library > Access Advanced Library Search", I cannot find the new permission in role ALL which including all permission automatically. there is one note 3528845 (Browse Library Feature faces error) Also mentioned this new permission. Thanks, Pedro

entry.title: Re: Field ISDfCSTEx in ADM1: where is it managed?
entry.content:
Hi,

You can check the Regions tab of the Intrastat Configuration window. In that tab there is a column 'Default for Export'. If that is marked, then this field ADM1.ISDfCSTEx has a value. If it is unmarked, there is no value in this field.

Hope it helps.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Structure Formatting for Receiver in SAP CPI through Groovy
entry.content: Can you post an entire XML Source snippet for both the possible use cases, along with the exact expected output as well in both cases ?

entry.title: Rise into the Future
entry.content:
Join SAP leaders, customers, partners, and industry experts virtually to learn how business AI, cloud ERP, and a connected supply chain can transform your business.

Make your move to an AI-infused cloud ERP
Join the Rise into the Future event to:
• Be the first to see the new embedded AI capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Supply Chain, enabled by Joule
• Discover new streamlined and AI-assisted ABAP and SAP Build capabilities
• Catch the latest updates from RISE with SAP Methodology including the generative AI-enabled assistant
• Hear from customers who have successfully transformed their businesses with RISE with SAP and are embracing AI

entry.title: Re: Unsupported Encoding \"br\ getting error message in API Service(NEO) in SAP Cloud Platfo
entry.content: Thank you Elijah, we used this solution to add the http header Accept-Encoding:application/gzip, then we successfully retrieved the data with BTP Integration Suite redirect external request into our internal S/4HANA ERP API.

entry.title: Re: Implementing Tablets that Run SAP EWM.
entry.content: Just use webgui or mobgui to run SAP in browser

entry.title: Employee Code Sequence Requirement
entry.content:
Dear Community Member,

I hope this message finds you well.

I would like to bring to your attention a critical requirement from my client regarding the employee code sequence, which is essential for their operations.

The client requests that the employee code be generated as follows:

  • Format: 8-digit number
    • 1st digit: Legal entity code
    • Next 3 digits: Year of joining minus 1900
    • Last 4 digits: Next sequence number for that specific entity (e.g., if the last employee ID is 0111, the next employee ID will be 0112)

Examples:

  1. If an employee joins company "ABC" in 2024, the employee code would be:

    • 1 (legal entity code for ABC)
    • 124 (2024 - 1900)
    • 0001 (first sequence number)
    • Final result: 11240001

  2. If an employee joins company "XYZ" in 2025, the employee code would be:

    • 3 (legal entity code for XYZ)
    • 125 (2025 - 1900)
    • 0001 (first sequence number)
    • Final result: 31240001

This code sequence is a showstopper for my client, and they require prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you for your assistance.

Thanks

Ranjan

entry.title: Re: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance payment to a vendor related to a fixed asset
entry.content: check configuration in OAYB: is Down payment enabled for asset classes?

entry.title: Extraneous module (punycode) preventing from deploying CAP Java app to BTP
entry.content:
Hey SAP Community,

When deploying our CAP Java app to BTP, we are getting the following error in our html5 deployer:

The error is due to the deprecated punycode module.

However, punycode module is not used in our code. It is not present in the package.json file.
If we run the command `npm ls punycode`, the output is as follows:

After running the deploy command (`mbt build` then `cf deploy mta_archives/SMT_1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.mtar`), which fails, if we run the `npm ls punycode` command again, we get the following output: 

Prior to this, we deployed only the backend which also contained the punycode module but that deployed successfully.

Questions:

1. What needs to be changed to remove this error?

2. How can we deploy regardless of this punycode module?

3. Can we also deploy android and iOS versions of the app instead of web to BTP?

entry.title: Re: How to display action result data in Page using rules...
entry.content:
Hi @bill_froelich,

Yes Main is referring to Main Page. We are performing this operation on Main page itself.

Thanks and Regards,

Madhav

entry.title: Re: Langchain Summarization Techniques: Leveraging Generative AI Hub via Custom Model
entry.content:
@mrajasekarana 

When using Langchain's Stuff technique for summarization, file size or document length becomes a crucial factor due to the token limit constraints of large language models (LLMs). The exact recommendation on file size or number of pages depends largely on the token limit of the specific LLM being used.

  • Token Limits/ Document size: Popular LLMs like GPT-3.5 have token limits of 4,000 to 16,000, roughly covering 2,000-3,000 words or 4-6 pages (500 words per page) of text that you can summarize.
  • Stuff works well for short documents of around 4-6 pages or documents that can fit within the LLM’s token limit (i.e., 4,000 to 16,000 tokens).

But If you're keen on using stuff technique for larger documents, then you can use larger context window models such as:

  • 128k token OpenAI gpt-4o
  • 200k token Anthropic claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620

These models can handle significantly more text in a single prompt, allowing for summarization of documents spanning tens or even hundreds of pages without chunking using Stuff. 

For larger documents, it's better to switch to the Map-Reduce or Refine techniques, which can handle large volumes by chunking the document and processing it in stages.

entry.title: IW51/IW52 Add two tasks when one action box item is clicked
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a scenario where there is an existing action box item in IW51/52 which when clicked adds a task. The required configuration is already in place for this. Now the requirement is, when the action item is clicked, in addition to adding the configured task, a second task needs to be added.

In other words, one click of an action box item should add two tasks.

Is there any exit or BADI where we can add an additional task?

I tried using the Z function module which is set up in the configuration of the activity. But adding entries in the tables parameter TI_IVIQMSM does not have any effect as the task details in the importing structure I_CUSTOMIZING is appended to the task list after this function module is executed.

Any inputs/suggestions on this would be much appreciated and helpful.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Rincy

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Smart data Integration Real time replication issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm also facing the same issue. Can you please let me know the solution that your problem got resolved

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Smart data Integration Real time replication...
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
I'm also facing the same issue. Can you please let me know the solution that your problem got resolved

entry.title: Re: Universe handling for similar universes with different connections.
entry.content: Why do you have two connections? Do different user groups use different databases? If so, why not have a single universe with security overrides to deliver the two connections?

entry.title: Re: Multiple Valuation Approaches/Transfer Prices in SAP S/4 HANA - Implementation hints
entry.content:
hi AlinaVranceanu,

thank your excellent blog and very detialed information.

I learn the workarond from your document about the condition of running the material ledger at the same time in the whole controlling area, 

"

Workaround, when a common run for the whole group cannot be managed:

Close organizations separately in CKMLCP

Create an (statistical) alternative valuation run AVR (CKMLCPAVR) for the whole group to calculate fully connected group results with actual costs

Use AVR results for reporting

"

and i have one concern about it, 

when we use the CKMLCP and the result will update the currenct period-end inventory value and the starting value of the next period, every ckmlcp will run by the base of the last ckmlcp result.

if we use the workaround, i know the  CKMLCPAVR by the base of the current period CKMLCP, and that means it can only caluate the material inventory value by the starting value of the next period which is included the add-on value in the transfer between two company in one group.

CKMLCPAVR 's result is just report , so how can ues it as a base caluation for next period parallel valuation?

thank in advance.

Darcy

entry.title: Re: To attach SAPUI5's MVC method to Fiori Element page i...
entry.content:
You have to try to bring as much as possible to your backend by using annotations on top of your cds, preferably using a metadata extension file. To know all possibilities you can have a look at the guidelines here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-fiori-feature-showcase/tree/main

besides that, you’ll find annotations example for all features in the ui5 documentation, eg here you also have an example for abap cds: https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/f0e1e1743bef4f519c34025ad4351f77

It can still be possible you want to achieve something which is not possible with annotations. In that case, you can create extensions in fiori elements using ui5. To do this, the fiori tooling can help you. You have the site map which allows you to configure the fiori elements app but you can also use the fiori guided development feature: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/getting-up-to-speed-with-sap-fiori-tools-guided-development-overview/ba-p/13500229#:~:text=What%20is%20SAP%20Fiori%20tools,a%20wider%20range%20of%20users.

Last but not least, you can also use the flexible programming model: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html

entry.title: Change description for COPA/Margin Analisys characteristic linked to data element
entry.content:
FIN Controlling FIN Cost Object Controlling

Dear all,

We have a self-created characteristic in CO-PA/Margin Analysis which is linked to data element. We create these characteristics by the append with the component Type KNNR – Customer.

Here we can see the description of data element.

As the data element in the original table is named "Customer", we now have several characteristics with the same description "Customer" in our CO-PA/Margin Analysis.

Is there any way to change the text of this own-created characteristic ZZWW* in CO-PA/Margin Analysis?

We want to give the characteristics a name other than "Customer".

Thanks

Kind regards

entry.content: Hello, I am also experiencing the same problem, I took the SAP certification test this time, and they said I needed a universal ID to check the results. However, even though I registered two more e-mails, it keeps asking me to connect the same universal ID. Could you possibly help me?

entry.title: REDEFINING DEFINE METHOD IN MPC_EXT, ENTITYSET ARE GONE
entry.content: Hi All,I redefined the method Define in MPC_EXT class, after I redefined it no entityset now. What should I do to fix it.

entry.title: Re: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content: Please change the title to "deleted" please, to avoid people opening your question. Or ask the administrator ("report as inappropriate").
